user_query: Mother is getting back early, find the fish dinner from before we deleted all the meals for day 2

selected_nodes.name: Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy
selected_nodes.short_description: Buttery black cod marinated in sweet white miso glaze, broiled until caramelized, and served with garlic-sautéed bok choy and steamed rice.
selected_nodes.meal_suggestion: Marinate black cod in a mixture of white miso, mirin, sake, and a touch of sugar for at least 2 hours (overnight is best). Broil until the glaze caramelizes. Sauté bok choy with garlic and a splash of soy sauce. Serve with steamed rice and garnish with sesame seeds.
selected_nodes.nutrition_note: Black cod is exceptionally rich in omega-3 fatty acids and provides high-quality protein; bok choy offers calcium, vitamin C, and vitamin K. Miso is fermented and supports gut health but adds sodium. A nutrient-dense, elegant dinner; balance with vegetables and moderate rice portions.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 2 > Mother > Day 2 > Dinner > Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy
selected_nodes.reasoning: The node 'Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy' is a fish dinner (Black Cod) located under Mother > Day 2, which matches the user's request to find the fish dinner from the set of meals that were previously deleted for that day.
